metadata.title: MeriGauMata - Cow Welfare & Natural Products
metadata.description: E-commerce platform for cow-based products, events, and donations.

footer.brandDescription: Dedicated to the timeless wisdom of the Vedic tradition, MeriGauMata is your gateway to authentic, cow-based wellness and spiritual products. Beyond our curated marketplace of Gavyas and natural essentials, we serve as a vibrant community hub for Gau Seva. Join us in our mission through event registrations, impactful donation programs, and insightful blogs that bridge the gap between ancient heritage and modern living. Embrace the purity of the Mother Cow and support a sustainable, sacred future with every contribution.
